commands_executed: awk '{if ($2=="/boot" && $4 !~ /(,|^)nosuid(,|$)/) {if (match($0, /#.*$/)) {comment=substr($0,RSTART,RLENGTH); line=substr($0,1,RSTART-1);} else {comment=""; line=$0;} n=split(line,a,FS); if (a[4]=="") a[4]="nosuid"; else a[4]=a[4]",""nosuid""; out=a[1]; for (i=2;i<=n;i++) out=out FS a[i]; out=out comment; print out;} else {print;}}' /etc/fstab > /tmp/fstab.new

#
# /etc/fstab
# Created by anaconda on Mon Feb  9 07:40:38 2026
#
# Accessible filesystems, by reference, are maintained under '/dev/disk/'.
# See man pages fstab(5), findfs(8), mount(8) and/or blkid(8) for more info.
#

# units generated from this file.

/dev/mapper/rlm-root    /                       xfs     defaults        0 0
UUID=8bbec118-7baf-40c6-910b-6a336e901242 /boot xfs defaults,nodev,nosuid 0 0
UUID=F56C-228D          /boot/efi               vfat    umask=0077,shortname=winnt 0 2,nosuid
/dev/mapper/rlm-home    /home                   xfs     defaults        0 0
/dev/mapper/rlm-swap    none                    swap    defaults        0 0
tmpfs /dev/shm tmpfs defaults 0 0

llm_verdict.message: No changes needed. The required `nosuid` option is already present.
